goal: Buy Apple products (MacBook / iPad) cheaply in Australia
summary: Apple has recently increased prices significantly, making the official store no longer the best option. Combining the Officeworks price beat (5% off competitor price) + discounted gift cards (~10%) + TopCashback (8%), you can save approximately 15–22%. Prioritise comparing prices at authorised retailers like JB Hi-Fi and The Good Guys, then take the lowest price to Officeworks and request a price beat.

steps.action: Compare prices at authorised retailers (JB Hi-Fi, The Good Guys, Mwave) to establish the lowest reference price
steps.detail: Apple's official store prices have risen sharply recently (some products up 20–25%); retailers like JB Hi-Fi often carry stock at prices well below Apple's new RRP. For example, the MacBook Neo 13" A18 Pro was listed at $829 on Mwave while Apple's new RRP was $1,049.

steps.action: Take the competitor's lowest price to Officeworks and request a price beat
steps.detail: Officeworks price beat: while the competitor has the item in stock, Officeworks will beat that price by 5%. Example: TGG iPad A16 $479 -> Officeworks ~$455.05; MacBook Neo has been beaten from a Bing Lee price down to $806. Note: the competitor must have stock available, and Officeworks must also have the item in stock.

steps.action: Pay with discounted gift cards at Officeworks or JB Hi-Fi
steps.detail: Coles/Woolworths periodically run 10% off gift card promotions (including Officeworks and JB Hi-Fi gift cards). Community members have confirmed that both Officeworks and JB Hi-Fi accept their respective gift cards at checkout, and the gift card discount stacks on top of the price beat price.

steps.action: Go through TopCashback AU to Apple Education Store or Apple Online for cashback
steps.detail: TopCashback AU has offered 8% uncapped cashback on Apple Online and Apple Education Store. This approach cannot be combined with the retailer price beat route; evaluate each path independently to see which gives the lower total. The Apple Education Store itself is ~9–10% cheaper, and combined with 8% cashback that's ~17% saved.

steps.action: During EOFY, watch for Officeworks Flybuys bonus points promotions
steps.detail: During EOFY, Officeworks runs Flybuys 10x points promotions (some targeted to specific users). Purchasing a $995 item earns roughly 4,950 Flybuys points (worth ~$25), equivalent to an additional ~2.5% effective discount.

total_est_saving: ~15–22% (depending on which combination of channels and timing applies)
risks: Apple's official prices have risen significantly; always check current retail prices rather than relying on historical figures
Officeworks price beat requires the competitor to have stock available, and Officeworks must also have stock
Discounted gift cards must be purchased from trusted sources (e.g. Coles/Woolworths official promotions) to avoid third-party risk
TopCashback promotions are time-limited; read the exclusions carefully
Flybuys 10x points promotions are targeted offers; not available to all customers
prerequisites: (Optional) Student or teacher status (for Apple Education Store)
